leadText: Lonely Spring (Japanese: 離れ湧水 Solitary Spring) is an area located in the eastern region of the Coronet Highlands of Hisui. It is located north of Heavenward Lookout, east of Sonorous Path, and south of Clamberclaw Cliffs. The Mountain Camp is permanently established between here and Sonorous Path after completing Request 65: "Setting Up the Mountain Camp".

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The Lonely Spring is an isolated lake at the eastern end of Sonorous Path. A river attaches to the lake and flows downhill toward Heavenward Lookout. It is almost completely surrounded by a mountain ring, which only opens up where the river flows out. The flora here is bright green and relatively lush.
